gaps: Frame bars (d3d_frame_*_bar): the Frame object is a compound at (0,0,0) — individual bar positions must be extracted from the frame-specific source CAD file.
Fasteners (fastener_*): bolts/pegs are not modeled as separate objects in this FreeCAD assembly.
d3d_extruder_5015_blower, d3d_extruder_sensor_holder, d3d_extruder_mount_top_plate: no clear FreeCAD match yet — visual verify needed.
